member.name: M:WebApiService.Controllers.DocumentsController.SearchDocuments(System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{WebApiService.Services.DocumentStatus},System.Int32)
member.summary: Search for documents using specific criteria. For security and performance reasons, retrieving all documents is not allowed in disconnected mode.
member.param: Maximum number of results to return (capped at 100)
member.returns: A list of documents matching the search criteria

member.name: M:WebApiService.Controllers.DocumentsController.GetDocument(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a specific document by ID from Hyland

member.name: M:WebApiService.Controllers.DocumentsController.CreateDocument(WebApiService.Services.CreateDocumentRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new document in Hyland

member.name: M:WebApiService.Controllers.DocumentsController.UpdateDocument(System.String,WebApiService.Services.UpdateDocumentRequest)
member.summary: Updates an existing document in Hyland

member.name: M:WebApiService.Controllers.DocumentsController.DeleteDocument(System.String)
member.summary: Soft deletes a document in Hyland

member.name: M:WebApiService.Controllers.DocumentsController.SearchDocuments(WebApiService.Services.DocumentSearchRequest)
member.summary: Searches documents in Hyland based on criteria

member.name: M:WebApiService.Controllers.DocumentsController.ArchiveDocument(System.String)
member.summary: Archives a document in Hyland

member.name: M:WebApiService.Controllers.DocumentsController.GetDocumentContent(System.String)
member.summary: Downloads the content of a document from Hyland
member.returns: The document content as a file

member.name: M:WebApiService.Controllers.DocumentsController.GetQueryMeteringStatus
member.summary: Gets the current query metering status

member.name: M:WebApiService.Controllers.DocumentsController.ConfigureQueryMetering(WebApiService.Controllers.ConfigureQueryMeteringRequest)
member.summary: Configures query metering limits

member.name: M:WebApiService.Controllers.DocumentSearchController.SearchByDocumentId(System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.Int32,WebApiService.Services.DocumentRetrievalOptions)
member.summary: Search documents by ID or ID range using Hyland Unity API patterns
member.param: Starting document ID for range search
Ending document ID for range search
Document retrieval options for performance optimization
member.returns: List of documents matching the ID criteria

member.name: M:WebApiService.Controllers.DocumentSearchController.SearchByDocumentTypeAndDateRange(System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Int32,WebApiService.Services.DocumentRetrievalOptions)
member.summary: Search documents by Document Type and Date Range using Hyland Unity API patterns
member.param: Start date for document storage date range
End date for document storage date range
Start date for document date range
End date for document date range
Document retrieval options for performance optimization
member.returns: List of documents matching the criteria

member.name: M:WebApiService.Controllers.DocumentSearchController.SearchByCustomQueryAndKeywords(WebApiService.Services.DocumentSearchRequest)
member.summary: Search documents using Custom Queries, Keywords, and Date Range using Hyland Unity API patterns
member.param: Advanced search request with custom query, keywords, and date filters
member.returns: List of documents matching the custom query criteria

member.name: M:WebApiService.Controllers.DocumentSearchController.GetAvailableCustomQueries
member.summary: Get available custom queries for the current user

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a type. Example: T:Namespace.Outer+Inner`1 becomes T:Namespace.Outer.Inner`1

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName or for an indexer P:Namespace.ContainingType.Item(System.Int32)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property given its container type and property name. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a method (or constructor). For example: M:Namespace.ContainingType.MethodName(ParamType1,ParamType2)~ReturnType M:Namespace.ContainingType.#ctor(ParamType)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.GetTypeDocId(System.Type,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a documentation ID string for a type. This method handles nested types (replacing '+' with '.'), generic types, arrays, pointers, by-ref types, and generic parameters. The flag controls whether constructed generic type arguments are emitted, while controls whether the generic arity marker (e.g. "`1") is appended.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.NormalizeDocId(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a documentation comment ID to match the compiler-style format. Strips the return type suffix for ordinary methods but retains it for conversion operators.
member.param: The documentation comment ID to normalize.
